title: Resiplex
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''resiplex''' was a large building, presumably a residential apartment complex. Resiplexs appeared on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] within [[sprawl]]s.

[[Teela Kaarz]]'s apartment was located in [[Resiplex 19]] of the Death Star.

==Appearances==
*''[[Coruscant Nights II: Street of Shadows]]''
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1stm|in book}}
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (abridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-05-XX -->''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''
